pet_notes: A compact friendly lantern-shaped desk companion with bright expressive eyes, a tiny tool satchel, subtle star-map markings, warm amber core glow, teal and graphite accents, and a curious maker personality; readable as a whole-body pet at 192x208; no text, logos, code, UI, scenery, shadows, or detached effects.
style_notes: Polished 3D toy mixed with clean sticker readability; rounded but not blob-like; high-contrast silhouette, soft matte materials, crisp edges, warm amber plus teal accents.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `3d-toy`: Stylized 3D toy mascot with smooth rounded forms, simple materials, clear silhouette, and no photoreal complexity. User style notes: Polished 3D toy mixed with clean sticker readability; rounded but not blob-like; high-contrast silhouette, soft matte materials, crisp edges, warm amber plus teal accents..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
